electra.summary: Vision that sees beyond immediate gain, aligning choices with long arcs of consequence.
electra.gameEffect: Boosts pattern recognition and long-chain scoring windows.
electra.unlockHint: Complete a sequence of matches that spans all five gem types without breaking the chain.

taygete.summary: Courage to act when the pattern is unclear, accepting risk without recklessness.
taygete.gameEffect: Increases reward for risky swaps that create multi-directional cascades.
taygete.unlockHint: Trigger three or more cascades from a single non-obvious swap.

alcyone.summary: Serenity that holds steady under pressure, keeping the field readable and calm.
alcyone.gameEffect: Reduces penalty from near-miss swaps and softens randomness after long chains.
alcyone.unlockHint: Play a full level with minimal mis-swaps while still achieving high score.

maia.summary: Autonomy to choose your own pattern, resisting external pressure to rush or conform.
maia.gameEffect: Unlocks alternative objectives and side routes in later levels.
maia.unlockHint: Complete a level while ignoring the suggested hint path entirely.

celaeno.summary: Sustenance that keeps the pattern alive, tending to what would otherwise wither.
celaeno.gameEffect: Adds small passive regeneration to conscience bars over time.
celaeno.unlockHint: Maintain a low but non-zero match rate over an extended session.

sterope.summary: Patience that waits for the right alignment instead of forcing the board.
sterope.gameEffect: Increases reward for delayed matches and long setup plays.
sterope.unlockHint: Hold a potential match in view for many moves before finally resolving it.

merope.summary: Humility that accepts imperfection and learns from misaligned patterns.
merope.gameEffect: Converts certain failed swaps into small conscience gains instead of pure loss.
merope.unlockHint: Recover from a near-fail state and still complete the level.
